emergency_definition: tripped main breaker that won't reset
non_emergency_routing_rules: Take caller name, phone number, and message. Schedule callback during business hours.

routing_rules.non_emergency: Take caller name, phone number, and message. Schedule callback during business hours.

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: I'm sorry, I wasn't able to connect you. Can I take your name and number so someone can call you back shortly?

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine if emergency, if yes collect name/number/address and attempt dispatch, if no take message and assure next-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine purpose, collect name and number, schedule appointment or transfer to team member, confirm next steps, close.
industry: residential and light commercial electrical work
service_area: the greater Austin area including Round Rock
average_job_value: has gone up to $850 since they started doing more EV charger and generator work
peak_season: summer because that's when AC units overload circuits and people do home renovations
greeting_style: Hey, thanks for calling Bright Spark Electrical! This is our service line — how can we help you today?
call_objective: to convert inbound calls into booked on-site estimates
objection_handling: not sure if they need a permit
scheduling_preferences: they want to offer online booking through their website and prefer to batch appointments by geographic zone to reduce drive time
follow_up_procedure: send a text confirmation within 1 hour of booking, then a reminder text the morning of the appointment
payment_processor: Stripe because they wanted better online payment support
notes: they want the AI to always mention their current promotion — free smart thermostat installation (valued at $150) with any panel upgrade booked this month. Also mention they are BBB A+ rated.
